subcategory: button with neobrutalist styling and variant system
use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and UI workflows
Secondary navigation elements with neutral styling
Icon-based interactive controls with circular sizing
Accessible focus-managed button states with keyboard support
ai_summary: A reusable button component featuring neobrutalist design with sharp borders, offset shadows, and satisfying hover offset animations. Built with class-variance-authority (CVA) supporting four variants (default, noShadow, neutral, reverse) and four sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Integrates Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Note: source code exports Button despite the pagination title metadata.
